dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But I'll be keeping the big top*.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: EHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH? But this is Captain Buggy's ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't see him here, do you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let us meet on the other side!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What're you doin'... Chewin' on yer bread...

dialogue.text: without a word to the boss here....!?
